subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 110621949 is not a GRB
body:
A. Goldstein (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

�The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 110621949 at 22:46:42 UT 
on 21 June 2011, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due 
to a GRB. This trigger is due to a local particle event."
